subject: Abby Johnson Conversation
body:
Watch this amazing conversation I had with Abby Johnson on Friday! | | | |
---
| **Watch the Conversation with Abby!**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Watch this amazing conversation with Abby Johnson. You have got to see this!

Abby Johnson is a former Planned Parenthood clinic director that resigned to be a Pro-Life advocate. Abby is frequently seen on national news networks, travels the globe, has authored a nationally best selling book, and founded the organization “And Then There Were None”.

The recent movie “Unplanned” was about her amazing story.

Abby was really phenomenal in this conversation, and it was so helpful. This video already has about 2,500 views. We talked about her story, standing for the unborn, how women can find healing after an abortion, and more.

Click the Blue Conversation Link button below, watch the interview, and email me with any of your thoughts.**

**Also, I had the privilege of meeting IL State Senator Dan McConchie recently. He is a tremendous person that is humble, hardworking, and diligent. I am rooting for Dan's re-election this November 3rd! (See photo below).

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=1720e6065e&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=f37ff5832a&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

name: Sandy Smith
subject: There is no way we let the left win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century.

_What can we learn from this?_

**The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. **

__Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death?__

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)

**_I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gQ0m5mm8i3Nxmng&b=v9fhEMoi9WOkm6NBM9wnng) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: Bill Olson
subject: Election day is 10 days out - Need help!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

I just wish someone would restore sanity to America! These vicious rioters in Portland, Chicago, Seattle and other liberal cities are not just causing havoc.

They are trying to take away your very freedoms, our American freedoms, and up until now.... they are succeeding.

Remember how the Fascistic the "Anti-Fascist", or Antifa, terrorist movement became? They refuse to allow free speech or debate, and are intimidating Americans from speaking their mind:

Self-censorship is on the rise according to a new Cato Institute survey that reports nearly two-thirds of Americans are afraid to share their political views.

A new CATO Institute/YouGov national survey found 62% of Americans say the political climate today prevents them from saying what they believe. This is up several points from 2017 when 58% of Americans said they were afraid to share their political beliefs.

“31% of liberals, 30% of moderates and 34% of conservatives are worried their political views could get them fired or harm their career trajectory,” the CATO survey stated.

The time has come to stop the Left's "Cancel Culture", and restore the First Amendment so Americans can be Americans again!

A recent poll conducted by Politico found that a plurality of Americans believe cancel culture has gone too far. (RELATED: Poll: Large Plurality of Americans Say Cancel Culture Has Gone Too Far)

“There have been shifts across the board, where more people among all political groups feel they are walking on eggshells,” the CATO survey found, adding, “majorities of Democrats (52%), independents (59%) and Republicans (77%) who all agree they have political opinions they are afraid to share.”

“Strong liberals stand out, however, as the only political group who feel they can express themselves. Nearly 6 in 10 (58%) of staunch liberals feel they can say what they believe,” the CATO survey found.

This problem isn't limited to Portland or Seattle. They won't just attack combatants- they have attacked the elderly and innocent and anyone they just didn't like the look of!

Unless we stop these nutty Stalinist bigots now, this will be the future of every American city.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

Stalinist thugs terrorizing normal Americans. Where does it end?

This Maoist dystopia is Seattle, today; and it will be America, tomorrow- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

Thank God President Trump is sending Federal Law Enforcement into these crazy liberal cities to put down these Antifa terrorists. There must be law and order!

This garbage isn't legal, it isn't Constitutional, and is hard-line Communism- this isn't the America ANY of us know! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms against the radical Socialists!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA
Florida is crucial for the Republicans. It's now the President's home state, with many swing districts like mine that we can flip!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

I appreciate whatever you can send so we can defeat Socialist Darren Soto and stop America from becoming Seattle!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gMMyRq_BpF6OuRU&b=Y5Fq1.3sVrN5tl0PS8WdEA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

name: Joe Biden
subject: My running mate and I are holding an event you won't want to miss
body:
As soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters like you who have powered our campaign since Day 1. |
---
Peter --

I'm almost ready to make one of the biggest announcements of this entire campaign: picking the woman who will serve as my running mate and the next Vice President of the United States.

I know that as soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters who have powered our campaign since Day 1, Peter. [**So I 'd like to personally invite you to join me and my running mate for our first grassroots fundraiser together as the official Democratic ticket.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-nd_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-nd_RS")

**We 'll be following up with everyone who RSVPs, and sending you the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized, but I didn't want to wait on giving you the opportunity to reserve your spot at this historic event.**

These grassroots fundraisers are one of my favorite parts of this campaign, Peter, and I'm especially excited for this one. I love talking directly with supporters like you about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what's at stake in this election.

And I can't wait to bring my running mate into that conversation, and introduce her to the supporters like you who have built this movement, and who will power us to victory in November.

Month after month, grassroots donations from supporters like you have made up nearly all of my campaign's donations, and I'm so proud of that fact. These contributions allow us to hire new organizers, expand our advertising, and build a campaign that will beat Trump on Election Day. Now, as we approach the home stretch of this campaign, I'll need your support more than ever for my campaign and Democrats down the ballot.

[**So I hope that you 'll join me and my running mate for our upcoming grassroots fundraiser, Peter, by making your first donation to our campaign and Democrats up and down the ballot today. Anything you can give right now will reserve your spot -- and believe me, you won't want to miss it:**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-nd_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-nd_RS")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Running-Mate-Grassroots-Fundraiser**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-nd_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.06_B1_vp-grfr_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopeners-nd_RS")

I'll get back to you on the time, the date, and yes, the running mate, but you should go ahead and get your ticket now before it fills up!

Thank you, Peter, for everything. I'm really looking forward to seeing you there.

Joe

To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baf4/1cd0ac28/17f826064/357ed035/1526825792/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baf4/1cd0ac28/17f826064/357ed032/1526825792/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baf4/1cd0ac28/17f826064/357ed030/1526825792/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931baf4/1cd0ac28/17f826064/357ed032/1526825792/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._

name: Todd Cheewing
subject: Fwd: ** Day of Action – August 15th **
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
We need YOU on our Grassroots Victory Team! Read more >>
Hey Peter, Corky wrote you about this, and I just wanted to make sure you saw it. You can read his message below.

We need top supporters on board for our first "Day of Action” during our 90-day drive to Election Day!

It’s coming up fast, on Saturday, August 15th.

[**Will you join our Grassroots Victory Team today and sign up for this special event?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3de98ed913b6a39/10b9bda53a5c7cbdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

I have been working to get us prepared for this critically-important Day of Action. **We’re going to be hitting the phones to share Corky’s message, delivering literature door-to-door, getting yard signs delivered.... and having a whole lot of fun too!**

I hope you’ll join us, Peter. As Corky mentioned in his message, we’re fully committed to outworking the Democrats to DEFEAT Jeanne Shaheen. But we can’t do so if we don’t build and sustain a strong Grassroots Victory Team.

[**Tap or click to sign up, and I’ll get in touch with you directly**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3de98ed913b6a39/82497beb37d6a9ebc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

\- Todd Cheewing
| |
---
From: Corky Messner
Date: Tuesday, August 4th, 2020; 2:10 P.M.
To: All Supporters
Subject: ** Day of Action – August 15th **
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3de98ed913b6a39/fb3b8747cedfdf82c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Friend,

This is a VITAL effort. I’m reaching out today to ask for your help.

With just weeks until the primary – and just 91 days until November 3rd – **we're going to be holding a Day of Action on Saturday, August 15th!**

We’re looking for supporters to step up across the Granite State, to participate in phone banks and door-knocking to help remind folks of all that’s at stake in this election.
[Sign up HERE to join our Grassroots Victory Team for this Day of Action!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3de98ed913b6a39/11c066a715d0e5ebc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
The Democrats know that Jeanne Shaheen is vulnerable, and they’re going to pour in MILLIONS to protect this seat. It’s critical that we keep up the pressure.

We’re 100% committed to outworking the Democrats to WIN... and your involvement is crucial to this effort!

[**Complete this form today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3de98ed913b6a39/e838a53535201c31c3d6b838967d376c/33153), and my campaign’s Field Director will get in touch with you directly, to provide details on what we have planned for August 15th.

I hope you see your name on our list of Day of Action volunteers!

\- Corky
[Join Our Grassroots Victory Team!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b3de98ed913b6a39/090590a9c174cab2c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

This is exciting news -- but it also comes with bad news. News outlets keep pointing out that we’re dealing with a pretty large money gap against our opponent Michael McCaul. And that is the only reason they are still hesitant to say we’re anything more than “competitive”. We have to respond and start making up ground. name: Team Joe
subject: TODAY: National Volunteer Call with Beto O'Rourke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Every day, we're building a powerhouse movement strong enough to take on Donald Trump and your role in this movement matters. Join our National Volunteer Call today. |
---
Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw our email about our National Volunteer Call happening later TODAY!

We've got big news too: Beto O'Rourke, will be joining our campaign manager, Jen O'Malley Dillon, and other special guests on the call to tell us why it's never been more important for our grassroots coalition to work hard to elect Joe Biden. [You don't want to miss this -- RSVP right now, and we'll see you later on the call!](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed08d/2191970734/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.mobilize.us/joebiden/event/296868/?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.09_B8_natvolcal-2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.09_B8_natvolcal-2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac") Team Joe

P.S. Can't join the call? No problem! [Make sure you're signed up to volunteer with Team Joe, and we'll send you more ways to take action on our campaign.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed08c/2191970734/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Distributed-volunteers?source=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.09_B8_natvolcal-2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=sms&utm_source=mc&utm_campaign=JB_EM_EV_2020.08.09_B8_natvolcal-2_X__F1_S1_C1__ac")
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed08b/2191970734/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed08a/2191970734/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed089/2191970734/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed088/2191970734/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed087/2191970734/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed086/2191970734/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed085/2191970734/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed084/2191970734/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed083/2191970734/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed082/2191970734/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed085/2191970734/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed081/2191970734/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed084/2191970734/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb10/1cd0ac28/17fac83d4/357ed080/2191970734/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

subject: re: the first grassroots fundraiser with the next President and Vice President of the United States
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw Joe's invitation. |
---
Peter --

Soon, Joe Biden will announce who his running mate will be. And no matter who it is, we know one of the first things she will want to do is speak with grassroots supporters like you!

**That 's why we wanted to make sure you saw Joe's invitation to join him and his future running mate for their first virtual grassroots fundraiser together.**

[**We 'll send you more details as soon as we can, but if you make your first donation of any amount to this email, you'll secure your ticket for the event! Can you chip in today? **](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Peter, we hope you'll read Joe's note below that lays out just how important grassroots donors like you are to this campaign and to electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot, and how excited he is to speak with you and our next Vice President very soon.

But first, if you can, will you chip in any amount to reserve your spot for the virtual grassroots fundraiser with Joe and his running mate? Once you do, we'll be able to follow up with you to confirm the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized.

**Chip in your first donation of any amount to reserve your spot at the very first grassroots fundraiser with the next President and Vice President of the United States:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Running-Mate-Grassroots-Fundraiser**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")

Thank you again for all you do, we can't wait to see you soon!

\- Joe Biden HQ

**\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---**
**FROM:** Joe Biden
**DATE: ** Wed, Aug 5, 2020
**SUBJECT: ** A personal invitation for you to meet my running mate
**TO: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")

Peter --

I'm almost ready to make one of the biggest announcements of this entire campaign: picking the woman who will serve as my running mate and the next Vice President of the United States.

I know that as soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters who have powered our campaign since Day 1, Peter. [**So I 'd like to personally invite you to join me and my running mate for our first grassroots fundraiser together as the official Democratic ticket.**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")

[**A donation of any amount via the buttons or link below -- even just $5 -- will secure your ticket to the event:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")
---
**We 'll be following up with everyone who RSVPs, and sending you the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized, but I didn't want to wait on giving you the opportunity to reserve your spot at this historic event.**

These grassroots fundraisers are one of my favorite parts of this campaign, Peter, and I'm especially excited for this one. I love talking directly with supporters like you about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what's at stake in this election.

And I can't wait to bring my running mate into that conversation, and introduce her to the supporters like you who have built this movement, and who will power us to victory in November.

Month after month, grassroots donations from supporters like you have made up nearly all of my campaign's donations, and I'm so proud of that fact. These contributions allow us to hire new organizers, expand our advertising, and build a campaign that will beat Trump on Election Day. Now, as we approach the home stretch of this campaign, I'll need your support more than ever for my campaign and Democrats down the ballot.

[**So I hope that you 'll join me and my running mate for our upcoming grassroots fundraiser, Peter, by making your first donation to our campaign and Democrats up and down the ballot today. Anything you can give right now will reserve your spot -- and believe me, you won't want to miss it:**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Running-Mate-Grassroots-Fundraiser**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf2020_fr_vpgrfr?refcode=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_VF_2020.08.09_B1_vp-grfr-bump_X__F1_S1_C1__event-nd")

I'll get back to you on the time, the date, and yes, the running mate, but you should go ahead and get your ticket now before it fills up!

Thank you, Peter, for everything. I'm really looking forward to seeing you there.

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5e3/1541169411/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5e2/1541169411/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5e1/1541169411/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5e0/1541169411/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5df/1541169411/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-info-bvf"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5de/1541169411/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5dd/1541169411/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb02/1cd0ac28/17e27655f/357ed5de/1541169411/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle._
clean_body: We wanted to make sure you saw Joe's invitation. | Peter -- Soon, Joe Biden will announce who his running mate will be. And no matter who it is, we know one of the first things she will want to do is speak with grassroots supporters like you! That 's why we wanted to make sure you saw Joe's invitation to join him and his future running mate for their first virtual grassroots fundraiser together. "" | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Peter, we hope you'll read Joe's note below that lays out just how important grassroots donors like you are to this campaign and to electing Democrats up-and-down the ballot, and how excited he is to speak with you and our next Vice President very soon. But first, if you can, will you chip in any amount to reserve your spot for the virtual grassroots fundraiser with Joe and his running mate? Once you do, we'll be able to follow up with you to confirm the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized. Chip in your first donation of any amount to reserve your spot at the very first grassroots fundraiser with the next President and Vice President of the United States: "" Thank you again for all you do, we can't wait to see you soon! \- Joe Biden HQ \---FORWARDED MESSAGE--- FROM: Joe Biden DATE: Wed, Aug 5, 2020 SUBJECT: A personal invitation for you to meet my running mate TO: "" Peter -- I'm almost ready to make one of the biggest announcements of this entire campaign: picking the woman who will serve as my running mate and the next Vice President of the United States. I know that as soon as she joins the campaign, she'll want to hear directly from the grassroots supporters who have powered our campaign since Day 1, Peter. "" "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" We 'll be following up with everyone who RSVPs, and sending you the exact date, time, and all the other details once they're finalized, but I didn't want to wait on giving you the opportunity to reserve your spot at this historic event. These grassroots fundraisers are one of my favorite parts of this campaign, Peter, and I'm especially excited for this one. I love talking directly with supporters like you about your hopes and dreams, the challenges you face, and what's at stake in this election. And I can't wait to bring my running mate into that conversation, and introduce her to the supporters like you who have built this movement, and who will power us to victory in November. Month after month, grassroots donations from supporters like you have made up nearly all of my campaign's donations, and I'm so proud of that fact. These contributions allow us to hire new organizers, expand our advertising, and build a campaign that will beat Trump on Election Day. Now, as we approach the home stretch of this campaign, I'll need your support more than ever for my campaign and Democrats down the ballot. "" "" I'll get back to you on the time, the date, and yes, the running mate, but you should go ahead and get your ticket now before it fills up! Thank you, Peter, for everything. I'm really looking forward to seeing you there. Joe | | "" "" "" "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

Friend,

We are less than three months away from Election Day, and I hope you have a moment to let me know your thoughts about the upcoming election and the issues we are currently facing.

An elected official’s most sacred duty is to faithfully represent the people they were elected to serve and that starts with listening. That’s why I want to hear from you, friend.

**[Do you have a moment to spare to fill out this important survey? I’d really like to hear your thoughts on the challenges facing Florida and our nation right now, and how you plan on getting involved in this critical election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18612159/234134438/-1835830492?contactdata=Zy3BriRZ0cp%2BGz8av4a2uIBm42TzkG%2BZBd8QJgXD8dBt57AFLoulEIC5nWdPs92dbMHDcld95CMGfkcq6szyi0X95%2BcAk%2FmThnuk5VoSFLWrFMUGPxVMtfbNKWtCd361G2gfxleabOvDKoEM3ptbBg%3D%3D&refcode=080920-es-priorities-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGE1ZGMwNi02OGRhLWVhMTEtOGIwMy0wMDE1NWQwMzk0YmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=55GqIswRHq4EWnfQm4fpobgiYXkE48WeWmKSgT4pXxI=&emci=0ca5dc06-68da-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=0da5dc06-68da-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&ceid=9814644)**

Our campaign is built on inclusiveness because each and every one of us has a part to play in this campaign, the future of Florida, and the future of our nation. That’s why I hope you take a moment to respond to this important survey.

Friend,

If the Mainstream media are consistent about one thing, it’s that they don’t report on the great things my Administration is doing for the American People and the Country.

While the Washington Swamp and Fake News DID NOTHING,I signed FOUR critical Executive Orders that will provide immediate relief for the American People.

The FIRST Executive Order provides a payroll tax holiday to Americans earning less than $100,000 per year.

The SECOND Executive Order protects Americans from eviction.

The THIRD Executive Order provides for the continuation of expanded unemployment benefits.

The FOURTH Executive Order extends relief to student loan borrowers through the end of the year.

I told you I will always put America FIRST, and I am proud to say that I have kept that promise to you every single day. But, the media wants Joe Biden to win in November, so they refuse to cover any of our accomplishments.

* Despite being in his seat for 18 years, Sen. Cornyn has consistently served special interests over Texans, so **he has an abysmal approval rating -- 29%!**
* **34% of Texas voters are still undecided** about who they're going to support in November -- that's a lot of voters we can reach.
* Polls show that the race is going to be tight. **Texas is the BIGGEST BATTLEGROUND STATE in 2020.**
* MJ is putting voters first -- with trips to some of the hardest hit parts of Texas, MJ is reaching out and showing voters that she won't leave them hanging.
* **If we win in Texas, we 're flipping the Senate.**
* **[Donating just $1 can have a huge impact on Texas, and the whole country along with it.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e6d/7f51f7bc/4098043c/4ef78565/3447461341/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NzEifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200809.1nd__1871__&amount=1")**

name: Ben Ray
subject: a quick question;
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Hi, I hope you're having a good Sunday! I'm so grateful to have the support of people in Cresco.

I'm personally reaching out before tonight's End of Week Deadline because, to be blunt, I'm still $11,892 short and facing devastating budget cuts.

I need every one of my supporters to step up, including you.

Democrats have an unprecedented opportunity to take back the Senate, but only if I win.

**[In a race this close, even one more donation could be the tipping point. So I'm asking, can you make your first donation before my critical deadline tonight?](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3a/1262942619/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200809_em_fr_b1_lujan_30&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")** I'll see all contributions that come in through this link! >> [**_https://act.benraylujan.com/Last-Chance#dpwillis67@gmail.com_**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3a/1262942619/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3R6WldOdmJtUmZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIyMCIsImUzdDBhR2x5WkY5aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IjcwIiwiZTN0bWIzVnlkR2hmWVcxdmRXNTBmWDA9IjoiMTMwIiwiZTN0bWFXWjBhRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTgwIn0%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20200809_em_fr_b1_lujan_30&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

Thank you for your support.

Ben Ray |
---
[](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3b/1262942619/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b38/1262942619/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b39/1262942619/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3e/1262942619/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3f/1262942619/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3c/1262942619/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3d/1262942619/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b39/1262942619/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b3b/1262942619/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. Click [_here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b30c/18e32a7f/4df036fe/7b210b32/1262942619/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe") to unsubscribe and your request will be promptly processed.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: important note from me (Newt)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
****
I've been a part of politics for long enough to recognize a historic moment, and the onslaught of vicious attacks Democrats are hurling at Susan Collins -- and the way they are trying to push her out of the US Senate -- are unprecedented, landmark and historic.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNTQ1OTMS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDcwNzg5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**Peter,**
I've been a part of politics for long enough to recognize a historic moment, and the **onslaught of vicious attacks Democrats are hurling at Susan Collins -- and the way they are trying to push her out of the US Senate -- are unprecedented, landmark and historic.**
[SUPPORT SUSAN TODAY](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNTQ1OTMS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDcwNzg5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Susan Collins is a vital member of the US Senate. In all her years of public service, she has never missed a roll call vote, she consistently puts her constituents first, and she is one of the most hard working Senators in Congress.**But right now there is a frenzied campaign led by the far Left liberals to oust Susan from the Senate.**
**Her opponent, Sara Gideon, is funded and supported by the radical Left**(Chuck Schumer, Elizabeth Warren, Hillary Clinton, Barack Obama) **and has spent millions of dollars to spread lies about Susan.**
And after Susan's opponent won the Democrat primary, something unprecedented happened -- something that has never occurred in the history of our democracy -- Gideon was given $4 million dollars for winning a mostly uncontested race. Peter, that has never been done before, and the fact that it happened just last month should bother you.
[Join Team Collins](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNTQ1OTMS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDcwNzg5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[Click here to help
Susan fight back >>](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxNTQ1OTMS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDcwNzg5NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
_**Here are the details:**_
In 2018, when Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh was up for confirmation, partisan activists **cornered **Susan to try and buy her vote. If she voted against Justice Kavanaugh, the money would be refunded to donors and just "go away." But if she voted for Kavanaugh, they would award her future opponent $4 million!
Susan's vote cannot and will not ever be bought -- something you and I both know full well. She is one of the toughest leaders out there.
But her vote that day in 2018 made her campaign a massive target, some pollsters and experts are claiming Maine's US Senate race is the most expensive and contested race in the country right now. And Susan is at a $4 million disadvantage.
**Republicans need to rally behind Susan 's campaign if we want to hold the Senate this fall. If we let the Senate slip into Schumer's greedy hands, Republicans will have no majority voice in Congress for YEARS. **
_**Susan, you have my support!!**_

name: Team Warner
subject: we need to talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Earlier this week, Mark Warner announced he will participate in three debates ahead of the 2020 Senate election.
* **The Northern Virginia Chamber of Commerce and NBC4 Washington Debate** is the traditional debate for top-of-ticket general elections in Virginia, and was held most recently in 2018 between Senator Tim Kaine and Corey Stewart.

* **The Norfolk State University Debate in Norfolk** will be the first debate hosted by Norfolk State University, and will focus on racial justice issues.

* **The People 's Debate** is hosted by AARP (American Association of Retired Persons) and WTVR (CBS6 in Richmond).

These debates are a critical chance for Mark to share his vision for the Commonwealth with voters and discuss the work he's done to benefit all Virginians. Mark has worked hard to protect and expand access to health care and deliver lasting economic relief to Virginians struggling during the Covid-19 crisis, and remains committed to building an economy that works for everyone.

We know that nothing in this election is guaranteed -- Mark won his election in 2014 by less than 1%. As we look forward to Election Day, we are so grateful for this strong grassroots network. We have the power to make a change in November and flip the Senate blue, but to do that it's absolutely critical that we send Mark back to the Senate. **[If you have the means, will you please consider contributing to Mark 's re-election effort?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db77/53d9897e/54067122/1c882b8e/829874097/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-debates?refcode=20200809_f_1_nd__701__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

This isn't the end of conversation with Virginia voters -- Mark is looking forward to participating in other forums and roundtable discussions ahead of the election, and will continue to hold virtual town halls for his constituents.

We are so grateful for your support. Thank you.

-- Team Warner

| [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db77/53d9897e/54067122/1c882b8d/829874097/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-debates?refcode=20200809_f_1_nd__701__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db77/53d9897e/54067122/1c882b8c/829874097/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

This campaign has been driven by grassroots contributions from supporters like you from day one, and we wouldn't have it any other way.

And with the help of the 2.9 million donors who have chipped in so far, we've been able to go toe-to-toe with Donald Trump's massive fundraising machine and even outraise him two months in a row in May and June.

**But this race is just heating up, Peter, and in July Donald Trump outraised us by $25 million.**

To get back on track and catch up quickly, it's going to take an enormous amount of grassroots strength. That's why we're reaching out for your help in crossing this milestone.

**With your support, we know there 's nothing that can stand in our way of beating Trump and electing Joe this November -- but we'll only get there together, Peter.**

[Will you step up today and become one of the 4500 first-time donors we need in Pennsylvania to cross our 3 million grassroots donors milestone? Pitch in $5 or more today to power our campaign and we'll send you a sticker to say thanks >>](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_teamjoesticker_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.09_B2_3mildon_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.09_B2_3mildon_X__F1_S1_C1__nd_T1")

Thanks for being a part of this campaign, Peter. Together we're fighting a battle to restore leadership to the White House. And with you on our side, we know it's a battle we can win.

Biden for President
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ed185/3037187281/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ed182/3037187281/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede7f/3037187281/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede7b/3037187281/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede78/3037187281/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede73/3037187281/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede71/3037187281/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede6e/3037187281/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede6c/3037187281/VEsHDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede68/3037187281/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede71/3037187281/VEsEBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede65/3037187281/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede6e/3037187281/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb0d/1cd0ac28/17fc2a026/357ede62/3037187281/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

| | Welcome to our team!

I am running for Congress because here in Michigan people think Washington is broken. We have been sending the same representatives to Congress and things are getting worse for most people in our community.

**It's time for a change.**

_As a nonpartisan mayor, I had to balance the budget, make tough decisions, and deliver results for people in our community. I didn’t know people’s political party, nor did I care. We just got things done together. And, in Congress, I will bring that same leadership to Washington and start getting things done for all of us, here in Michigan._

**I can't do this alone.**

Here are great ways to get involved:

BREAKING: PRESIDENT TRUMP SIGNS FOUR EXECUTIVE ORDERS

Friend,

While Democrats in Congress were playing politics with the critical Coronavirus Relief Bill, President Trump took action to put AMERICA FIRST.

The President just signed FOUR Executive Orders that will provide immediate relief to Americans who need it most during this difficult time.
- Extending Unemployment Benefits
- Preventing Evictions
- Extending Student Loan Relief
- Payroll Tax CutsThe Radical left has shown they don’t care about helping the American People. They would rather obstruct the President and watch you suffer than help everyday Americans get back to work. It’s disgusting and can’t let them get away with it!

President Trump will always do what is best for you and your family. He even announced that after re-election, he will make permanent cuts to the payroll tax.

He asked us to reach out to some of his BEST supporters, like you, to get your input on these critical Executive Orders.

We only have one question for you:

Do you support President Trump’s FOUR Executive Orders to provide immediate relief for Americans?

name: Matt Mayberry for Congress
subject: Mayberry on the issues: Education
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg0MTAyODg3MDM3NDczODM1JmM9ZDduMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODQ2MzIzOTUmZD1pMmg1eTV6.V6LhP3vMufFNw2wSrZMd9RX3_i44oEcuz9SVfjTu4AQ)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Mayberry on the Issues: Education
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends, Far too many substance-less political campaigns like to talk in generic platitudes about the issues. Not me! I want to give you in depth plans and statements about where I stand. I hope my "on the issues" emails give you more information about what I will do as your Congressman. You can visit my [issues section](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDg0MTAyODg3MDM3NDczODM1JmM9ZDduMyZlPTE5MjgmYj0zODQ2MzI0MDEmZD1hOGw4cDd3.00d2yJGNo2zq8dtoHIlRIbtog8THXM8nbASjrIYif08) for more, or call me directly on my personal cell phone at [603-969-7077](tel:603-969-7077) to discuss anything important to you! Thank you, - Matt
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
### **EDUCATION**
The federal Department of Education should be abolished. Monies that were going to the federal cesspool of waste and red tape should be redirected back to the individual States. I have more faith in Governor Sununu, Commissioner Edelblut and our legislature to ensure that our children and grandchildren have the best education available to them. Our children deserve a dynamic, up to date and comprehensive curriculum that reflect current workplace needs and an overall education to prepare those children to either attend college, a trade school, our military or enter the workforce fully prepared for their lives ahead. I believe in school choice including the ability to home school, attend a magnet school or a specialty, charter or trade school. Credit should be given to “real life education”. Why shouldn’t a student who works at a nursing home or hospital be given health education credits or the student who works as a mechanic be given classroom credit. Why does a varsity athlete still have to take gym during the school day? Special education and the education of special needs children need to be fully funded. If the federal government is setting a national standard, then the federal government should be paying for it. No more unfunded mandates. I served on the Dover School Board, the only candidate in this race to have served my local community. I understand the issues of education and the debilitating efforts of the teachers union on our education system as it currently stands. Abolish the federal Department of Education and let New Hampshire decide how to best educate our children.
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Mayberry on the Issues: Education | | | | | | | | Friends, Far too many substance-less political campaigns like to talk in generic platitudes about the issues. Not me! I want to give you in depth plans and statements about where I stand. I hope my "on the issues" emails give you more information about what I will do as your Congressman. You can visit my for more, or call me directly on my personal cell phone at tel:603-969-7077 to discuss anything important to you! Thank you, - Matt | | | | | | EDUCATION The federal Department of Education should be abolished. Monies that were going to the federal cesspool of waste and red tape should be redirected back to the individual States. I have more faith in Governor Sununu, Commissioner Edelblut and our legislature to ensure that our children and grandchildren have the best education available to them. Our children deserve a dynamic, up to date and comprehensive curriculum that reflect current workplace needs and an overall education to prepare those children to either attend college, a trade school, our military or enter the workforce fully prepared for their lives ahead. I believe in school choice including the ability to home school, attend a magnet school or a specialty, charter or trade school. Credit should be given to “real life education”. Why shouldn’t a student who works at a nursing home or hospital be given health education credits or the student who works as a mechanic be given classroom credit. Why does a varsity athlete still have to take gym during the school day? Special education and the education of special needs children need to be fully funded. If the federal government is setting a national standard, then the federal government should be paying for it. No more unfunded mandates. I served on the Dover School Board, the only candidate in this race to have served my local community. I understand the issues of education and the debilitating efforts of the teachers union on our education system as it currently stands. Abolish the federal Department of Education and let New Hampshire decide how to best educate our children. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid For By Matt Mayberry for Congress | | | Matt Mayberry for Congress | | P.O. Box 1776, Dover NH 03821 United States | | | ---|---|---

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: Donald Trump's "Friday Night Massacre" at the Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good VA
body:
| | |
Dear Derek,
Recently, I wrote our grassroots team about Donald Trump's attacks on the Postal Service. You can read my full message below, but I wanted to give you another troubling update.
On Friday, former Trump campaign donor and new Postmaster General Louis DeJoy FIRED top Postal Service executives and reshuffled dozens of key leadership positions throughout the agency.
It's another shameless attempt to sabotage the Postal Service just months before the 2020 election.

Derek, more Americans are expected to vote by mail than ever before this November. Trump's attacks on the Postal Service are a serious threat to our democracy and we can't stay silent.
**[Will you join me in standing up to Donald Trump by adding your name and making your voice heard?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8mX1GnZjjO05pkrRBnN1PO1zHgsOtVLW3XBeF-laL5GDgt7p1Q2W67iOaHXX13QxB_PoGYiSoWEI-Ge1EeAC4gVCE4wfdA7oiy92F0YU56rVycf_QOeDNDc_kgzXIiV9AqrUzjpjL7It1TIp0vFdlRvR9NtDYXfjAZOWz0O_xhZL0NlIULHEd7is1BcBZv-gniuri7J8I6tN3bkp43bSJmJNyJu86OAjt4QaCPjMxnvmHzAadf4J89CLxSKKxXA1WrD8-OiH2Awi4jXsd8rwkAYxFk9zbQBDsWQZVJ6MX1pe2NtH2hPUv7pTRZa1ra-I2geRS9WOMe3RUSbQKe5BAxdCX44vSYYd73FX3_a_mZDehTZXLZNBzGG9_aiL9kas/346/IF0SOwDSTFWfKdXDT3C1EA/h0/QuaqocHRMSbvgY21gIyD1tEz98xv9z5SuQXKX6DTQhQ)** **
** Thank you,
Terry
\-----Forwarded message-----

Dear Derek,
Donald Trump’s attacks on the U.S. Postal Service aren’t going away. In May, Trump appointed a top donor named Louis DeJoy to run the USPS. Now reports of slow mail are coming from all over the country, including here in Virginia. It’s disturbing and it couldn’t be happening at a worse time. More Virginians than ever will be voting by mail in 2020. We need to know that Postal Service employees are getting everything they need to safely and efficiently do their jobs. **[I’m looking for 5000 grassroots supporters to call on Donald Trump to stop his attacks on the Postal Service. Can you add your name?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8mX1GnZjjO05pkrRBnN1PO1zHgsOtVLW3XBeF-laL5GDgt7p1Q2W67iOaHXX13QxB_PoGYiSoWEI-Ge1EeAC4UxMWJ0AihOVMQKBXVDMFrojRQXFThyc5bIR9irKQ9AKiexbbmqeEgEpR-OjmUDeKW_YhnuT4WpMHf0t9zWT8gVxMsLGwopK7ZkGbBoZ3fpR5RCul_vEt3U6S20HKVwEgTkdWckKr3KSr8dxRWMUEbL3UCeT1wRVnPWcbB3zrEyBpsG433XEccDy9-HA6xRF-jYexUQ1e78Boxb--CIT364QDR9sDnRrkyVR5E4x1OkWo71YtfsLSGWjZXVkafXd_LtC4LUldkF5r3eLg1fDejXDcZZaa7MCUKrbEhOsms7c/346/IF0SOwDSTFWfKdXDT3C1EA/h1/cc8y4uA9c6UCG0myT2j5hK8KnFF2_ZIgnIxuyRz16h0)** Trump’s attacks on the Postal Service aren’t happening in a vacuum. He’s called the Postal Service a “joke.” He’s endangered the jobs of 600,000 federal workers by refusing to help the USPS through its financial crisis. Now his buddy DeJoy is slowing down the mail before the most important election in a generation. **[Please add your name right now and demand Donald Trump end the attacks on the Postal Service.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn8mX1GnZjjO05pkrRBnN1PO1zHgsOtVLW3XBeF-laL5GDgt7p1Q2W67iOaHXX13QxB_PoGYiSoWEI-Ge1EeAC4P_VozzYnwF5JoRFJWq5oC8EYYJXZBinefZZ9vw64SGj9fUBNT9jAVcMa9W5Q21r2g3werTHpcxvaXK623LTkCNJQuM7A2nOplDlRgCNTa4xTmjkIIPR88rS11kQRopq04hAOUmTgXkFkaBouFjmklEFK3k7KLV0i20STcoZC0cLOwtiXrI_dwP4f3_bcHKmWZ1hcrBuyGMD9yJYT3GTRprfc4sUQYD7mpXYNsdTKkzPxpg9pzI88xjq8j10HVZjhTond2_Da2qB6OI7xcfnHUuZ9HzKqhb2Oq2LBjgVgoFw/346/IF0SOwDSTFWfKdXDT3C1EA/h2/P-9w4-p86kaop2jPd4EHypAVEmbi8mCpsOok4PRtAts)** Thank you, Terry

| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miMlYzrDTXorh54W6kP4vaL4HgNuEZRc_c_gvFRdQ1ns40JT_ex_O2QMpyO1pxhQ3HAZIlimKsBNJcOYUU-aiqFI7w8oVtifZ1eRxslYh84FwvmFP2zl-V8R63hglOr-TLo5EFLmXCKAM0aJH4X2R3mfzhTA7yiaz7Vtlzy03ozN6dbcZw9uLpi2y6-R-hilJ5op4zpyISSIz6Q4q5bBkTwyQKpRed_WALWEUsSg8_9icEAaMCpnQQEC7ZDVvfDk86FEpSyAOICAs2qup3bKpKZiDmYU1rGK9B2bQB-mWVee7gtvAFeo3OV7xGxzy0mlT7ZDEWabQDFLOUKE27OK8J9f5wOeSRkJ0qmAaL97XwhDMDxRU4JySwUhaWQNhYJQF6/346/IF0SOwDSTFWfKdXDT3C1EA/h3/1Q0wHI2oPuC9BdEKZ_yG52-u2mXMuJRwCwDk0K9pEkQ)

body:
Hi everyone, I hope you’re safe and well. I am proud to announce that I have been endorsed by the Pennsylvania AFL-CIO. I admire the w
| | [**Can't See This Message?**_View in a browser_****](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=TzuWwkIr-smWzTbqIBIHzfKGRCOB4XIHlp8Y1O5-63M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9zby9jOE5GS1Q5UVEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ)

| | | | Lee's Newsletter - August 9th
---
| | Hi everyone, I hope you're safe and well. I am proud to announce that I have been endorsed by the Pennsylvania AFL-CIO. I admire the work they do to help the working people of Pennsylvania and I am honored to receive their support. In other news, Congress has still not agreed on the terms of the next stimulus bill while many Americans are left without federal supplements to unemployment benefits. The executive orders from the White House haven't solved the issue and have raised problems of their own. Additionally, the most recent executive order is to suspend the payroll taxes that fund Social Security and Medicare, and the President confirmed yesterday that he would make those tax cuts permanent. This raises serious questions about how we can continue to fund two of our most popular and essential federal programs. I am deeply concerned and believe that the solution for now is for Congress to pass another pandemic relief bill quickly. Special note: The Census Bureau will end its operations a month early, which risks inaccurate counts that will affect decisions about funding and services for the next 10 years. This especially impacts rural areas like ours where counting can be more difficult. Please [respond to the Census here](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=0reg9D3_qclFrmbIXL_FxB0Xhav2kIX0eZSbkY8rBMs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9teTIwMjBjZW5zdXMuZ292LyIsInIiOiJiNGM4ZDAzZi02N2EyLTRjYTUtNjVhNC0zY2VkY2ZhMTg4MTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ) to make sure our district is accurately counted. In international news, the explosion in Beirut, Lebanon was the third biggest the world has seen - damaging buildings in a 6-mile radius, injuring at least 5,000 people and displacing 300,000 from their homes. It's heartbreaking and devastating to see what has happened to so many, especially while we are still in the middle of a pandemic. Our prayers and love go out to the people of Lebanon who have to rebuild during this time. Last week we continued our virtual town hall tour with Clinton, Bradford and Snyder Counties, joined by several great candidates for PA State Senate and House: Jackie Baker (SD-23), Margie Brown (SD-25), Michelle Siegel (SD-27) and Katie Evans (HD-85). I'm proud to be campaigning and sharing a ballot with so many strong, capable women who are running to represent their communities. With candidates like these on the ticket it really feels like something special is happening this year, and I'm excited for what we can all accomplish once we're in office. This week our virtual town hall tour continues with three more events:Tuesday, August 11th at 7pm with Susquehanna County and Jackie Baker (SD-23)Thursday, August 13th at 7pm with Northumberland County and Michelle Siegel (SD-27)Friday, August 14th at 7pm with Tioga County and Margie Brown (SD-25) Please [sign up here](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=D0-iOkpp7WdRnQGrm2LPNFMwDpgkTQnWFuqTlksxzA8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly90aW55dXJsLmNvbS95OHB4eWs2NCIsInIiOiJiNGM4ZDAzZi02N2EyLTRjYTUtNjVhNC0zY2VkY2ZhMTg4MTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ) for your county's event. The only way we can turn PA blue is with your help. Our volunteer team is growing, and training sessions are ongoing. Please [sign up here](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=40o-mGQlJGk_bQsrhDBGvixr6DAQwVaN1qLV7700Hvk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGVlZ3JpZmZpbmZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS9nZXQtaW52b2x2ZWQiLCJyIjoiYjRjOGQwM2YtNjdhMi00Y2E1LTY1YTQtM2NlZGNmYTE4ODEwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZmY5MWEyMGQtZGIxOS00NGQ1LWIzZWUtOWIzZjhkYjBiYzJlIn0) to join the team. Share this newsletter with your friends and family. Like and share our [Facebook](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=HbQrOB6w2DTR0WdXkGfaLOVxOBG9AW7ELHzxvs8J95M.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL0xlZUdyaWZmaW5Gb3JDb25ncmVzcy8iLCJyIjoiYjRjOGQwM2YtNjdhMi00Y2E1LTY1YTQtM2NlZGNmYTE4ODEwIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZmY5MWEyMGQtZGIxOS00NGQ1LWIzZWUtOWIzZjhkYjBiYzJlIn0) and [Instagram](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=830VgCeTHPzgPoC39EKW-XlU7Vcls5WWlsr0edLOdLU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9sZWVncmlmZmluZm9yY29uZ3Jlc3MvIiwiciI6ImI0YzhkMDNmLTY3YTItNGNhNS02NWE0LTNjZWRjZmExODgxMCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImZmOTFhMjBkLWRiMTktNDRkNS1iM2VlLTliM2Y4ZGIwYmMyZSJ9) pages. And make sure you request your [mail-in ballot](https://www.leegriffinforcongress.com/so/c8NFKT9QQ/c?w=G1rmxIC_H8NdaGaK1NSICxE3qMmAfwoJZOzOD1T_bE0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGF2b3RlcnNlcnZpY2VzLnBhLmdvdi9PbmxpbmVBYnNlbnRlZUFwcGxpY2F0aW9uLyMvT25saW5lQWJzZW50ZWVCZWdpbiIsInIiOiJiNGM4ZDAzZi02N2EyLTRjYTUtNjVhNC0zY2VkY2ZhMTg4MTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJmZjkxYTIwZC1kYjE5LTQ0ZDUtYjNlZS05YjNmOGRiMGJjMmUifQ). We can do this, together. Have a great week, and stay safe! Lee
---

I'm proud to be campaigning and sharing a ballot with so many strong, capable women who are running to represent their communities. With candidates like these on the ticket it really feels like something special is happening this year, and I'm excited for what we can all accomplish once we're in office. This week our virtual town hall tour continues with three more events:Tuesday, August 11th at 7pm with Susquehanna County and Jackie Baker (SD-23)Thursday, August 13th at 7pm with Northumberland County and Michelle Siegel (SD-27)Friday, August 14th at 7pm with Tioga County and Margie Brown (SD-25) Please for your county's event. The only way we can turn PA blue is with your help. Our volunteer team is growing, and training sessions are ongoing. Please to join the team. Share this newsletter with your friends and family. Like and share our and pages. And make sure you request your . We can do this, together. Have a great week, and stay safe! Lee | | | | Share Via: | | |
