name: =?utf-8?Q?Simona=20Grace?=
subject: Trump Cut Unemployment-We Have a $100 to Give
body:
Moms in Office Invites You to Join A Financial Firm with a Conscience | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Friend,

Unemployed workers had been receiving a supplement of $600, a benefit that expired on July 31. President Trump signed an executive order yesterday which would cut benefits to $300 a week in additional payments to the unemployed.

Such a reduction would cause millions of families to face an income drop of 30% to 50% and we think this is devastating and unacceptable.

We are working hard to elect Representatives that would not let this happen, but many of us can't wait that long and we want to give back to those who are struggling during one of the most difficult economic crises of our lifetime.

Our friends at [Aspiration Bank](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=116a967cb2&e=3f151f8b74) extended a generous offer to our supporters.

Aspiration offers socially-conscious and sustainable banking services and investment products, so you can make money while making the world a better place. And, unlike the Big Banks, they don’t use your deposits to fund oil pipelines or turn your fees into campaign contributions to the politicians that work against you.

[Sign up here](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=52b969c004&e=3f151f8b74) to get $50 when you open an account and Moms in Office founder Simona Grace* will add an additional $50.

[*Terms Apply](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=24d159569b&e=3f151f8b74)
---
| [Sign Up Here ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=fe1fc82279&e=3f151f8b74 "Sign Up Here ")
---
|
---
|
---
# This former D.C. insider is building a bank for ‘forgotten Americans’
["We decided ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=48d20e0a71&e=3f151f8b74)it was the right time because a big part of why we as a country are in the midst of this crisis is because we didn't act boldly enough and quickly enough when we could have to respond to COVID," he said. "We're long past the point of responding quickly [to climate change], but we still have time to respond boldly, and in a big way and for each individual to step up."

"Banks, beset with myriad balance sheet issues following the financial crash, were slow to innovate elsewhere."

[Fortune ](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=3405e095f9&e=3f151f8b74)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: We want our country back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. **

I'm a fighter, and one of the conservative fighters I respected the most was always Herman Cain. His sudden passing saddens me beyond belief.
I had the great honor of meeting Mr. Cain a few years back when he gave the commencement speech at my son’s graduation. His speech and life story was very inspiring and motivating and proved with hard work and determination you can do anything. He was a true patriot and will be missed.
_**Herman Cain is a hero- and his American Dream is one for the history books**_. He rose from destitute poverty to become CEO of Godfather's Pizza, a radio host, a Presidential candidate, and a Chairman of a Federal Reserve Bank. He grew up in a three room house, sometimes sleeping on the floor- to parents who worked five jobs between them. He beat Stage IV cancer before he accomplished much of his biggest feats.
**_Clearly this is someone that the country should mourn. _**
But are Democrats mourning Herman Cain? No. They rejoice in his passing, in the most ghoulish fashion possible. They mock Mr. Cain and the President, such is their hatred:
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)
---
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)
---

**_We just got lectured by the far Left for 2 months about how "Black Lives Matter". They burned black-owned businesses, killed black people (including children), and destroyed black communities. _**

Now they rejoice in the death of one of the most prominent black politicians of the 21st Century.

_What can we learn from this?_

**The radical Left doesn't care who you are. They don't care where you live or your creed or race. If you disagree with them in the slightest, they will attack you and rejoice in your death. **

__Can you imagine if they took power? Do you want your family to be at the mercy of a party and a terrorist movement (Antifa) that wishes for your death?__

[If that isn't YOUR vision for America, I need your help to change Congress and evict Pelosi!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)

**_I will NEVER support the radical Left. AOC and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is a Swampy leftist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ). I appreciate you and thank you. Let's do this!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i5QXAVivS3Nxmng&b=1TByOhF_QYKS4KVlFXQqwQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

[Unsubscribe](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsTAwcLMzM) | [Change Subscriber Options](https://www.aweber.com/z/r/?rMyMrEwcrLQcbIyMTGxMzLRGtCzsTAwcLMzM)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Joe Biden is a racist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back Florida’s competitive 9th District, currently held by Socialist Democrat Darren Soto. And I need your help to restore sanity to Congress!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

Joe Biden has gone off the rails so many times, I question his mental health.

Just a few months ago, he said that if a black person didn't vote for him, "you ain't black!"

Where does he get this stuff???

His most recent slur? Black people all think the same:

Amid the fallout from comments by former vice president and presumptive Democratic presidential nominee Joe Biden about a lack of diversity of thought and heritage within the African American community, some worry that a pattern of blunders could impact support within the Black community.

Biden drew criticism on Thursday when he compared the diversity of African American and Latino communities at a pretaped virtual talk with the National Association of Black Journalists and the National Association of Hispanic Journalists.

"What you all know, but most people don't know. Unlike the African American community, with notable exceptions, the Latino community is incredibly diverse community with incredibly different attitudes about different things," Biden said. "You go to Florida you find a very different attitude about immigration in certain places than you do when you're in Arizona. So it's a very different, a very diverse community."

"To diminish those cultures and the richness of those cultures is such a wildly ignorant thing to do and insulting on so many levels," said Williams, who is the son of immigrants from Grenada. "But I wish I was surprised."

Joe Biden and Darren Soto share the same mindset. They believe that just because a certain minority group may have voted for you in the past, they will do so in perpetuity, no matter how far you may go astray.

Believe your eyes, neither Joe Biden nor Darren Soto shares your values, no matter what the color of your skin.

Folks, no one’s perfect. Heaven knows I’ve fallen so many times I’ve got holes in the knees of my jeans.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

But, I implore you, don’t be fooled by the identity politics of Joe Biden and Darren Soto.

He votes with Pelosi and the Squad 93% of the time!

Vote your values!

I’m just a regular guy. I am not a political bigshot. But 14 months ago I renewed my military oath to protect and defend the Constitution of the United States from all enemies foreign and domestic. I’ll follow my Conscience, first and foremost. protect the Constitution, and my neighbors, always!

Joe Biden's racial theories will become our reality- unless we do something RIGHT NOW!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

President Trump doesn't put us in categories like that. He's not just the President of one or another group of Americans, like the Democrats are. He's the President of ALL Americans!

We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw
?

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw
This is a swing district and we can take it back!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw
today? I have a goal of $35,000 raised this month, and I am not making the progress I'd hoped. That's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=i3bdLXzWZF6OuRU&b=TP0R9AW8jMiMYX2ZOBKzIw
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

I’ll follow my Conscience, first and foremost. protect the Constitution, and my neighbors, always! Joe Biden's racial theories will become our reality- unless we do something RIGHT NOW! Image President Trump doesn't put us in categories like that. He's not just the President of one or another group of Americans, like the Democrats are. He's the President of ALL Americans! We must fight now or our country and our freedoms will be lost. Will you stand with me ? Image I'm a soldier- not a slick politician. But I remember that I have taken an oath to the Constitution! I don't have big PAC money, which is why I need your help! I need your help today- to replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Communism! Can you help me? This is a swing district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? I have a goal of $35,000 raised this month, and I am not making the progress I'd hoped. That's why I need your help today! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. 5 Halifax Ct Marlton NJ 08053 USA To unsubscribe or change subscriber options, visit:

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Did You Hear What the Democrat Speaker Said?
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_hear&n=1)
---
Peter \-- The Democrat Speaker of the Minnesota House just told us that we can't have an economic recovery until Governor Walz is able to "stop COVID in its tracks." Can you believe that? How convenient for the Democrats who want to restructure our free market economy into their socialist utopia, while costing Trump his re-election. Democrat leaders clearly don't care about our liberties. But now it also appears they don't care about the lost jobs and crushed business dreams that result from their shutdowns. Here's Speaker Melissa Hortman in her own words... [](http://www.action4liberty.com/speaker_hortman_no_economic_recovery?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_hear&n=2) How much longer is Speaker Hortman (phone 651-296-4280) going to take her marching orders from Tim Walz? It's time she takes back the power of the legislature. **But we're hearing from insiders at the Capitol that she might not bring a vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers when the legislature convenes on Wednesday! That's the only reason they have been recalled to St Paul!** Is she going to continue being a puppet for Governor Walz so he can continue exercising his illegal emergency powers? If you lost track, we're now on **Day 149 of this "emergency"**. After months of pressure, we finally have the Senate Republicans on board. And in July, we got four Democrats to break ranks in the House. **All we need to End Walz' Emergency Powers is five more rural or suburban Democrats!** Can you help us out? We need you to contact these seven DFL legislators and tell them to vote to End Walz' Emergency Powers on Wednesday. **Rep Rob Ecklund - 651-296-2190 /[rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn](mailto:rep.rob.ecklund@house.mn)** **Rep Jeanne Poppe - 651-296-4193 /[rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeanne.poppe@house.mn)** **Rep Dan Wolgamott - 651-296-6612 /[rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn](mailto:rep.dan.wolgamott@house.mn)** **Rep Jeff Brand - 651-296-8634 /[rep.jeff.brand@house.mn](mailto:rep.jeff.brand@house.mn)** **Rep Brad Tabke - 651-296-8872 /[rep.brad.tabke@house.mn](mailto:%20rep.brad.tabke@house.mn)********Rep Zach Stephenson - 651-296-5513 /[rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn](mailto:%20rep.zack.stephenson@house.mn)** **Rep John Persell - 651-296-5516 /[rep.john.persell@house.mn](mailto:rep.john.persell@house.mn)**
## Fill up their inboxes and phone lines with this message:
Script: Rep _______, we Minnesotans demand a vote on Walz' Emergency Powers when you convene on Wednesday. Don't let Speaker Hortman block a clean vote on the Resolution. And stop protecting Walz' Emergency Powers after 149 days. Vote YES on the Resolution. Alternate Script: Rep ________, I heard that Democrat Speaker Hortman is not going to allow a vote on the Emergency Powers this Wednesday. If that happens, I hold you responsible for it. You have a duty to vote on the Resolution according to Statute 12.31. Vote YES and don't let Democrat leadership stop a clean vote. While you make these calls, we'll be running ads in their districts and bringing the heat. Politicians care about one thing: getting re-elected. Let's let them know they are in bad shape this November if they don't do the right thing! [](http://www.action4liberty.com/end_walz_brand_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_hear&n=3) **In Liberty,

** **Jake Duesenberg** **President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_hear&n=4).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_hear&n=5).
Created with [NationBuilder](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=did_you_hear&n=6), software for leaders.

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Sorry to bother you, but this is important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We know it's not the first time we've reached out for your help in saving the USPS, but Trump's attacks on the Postal Service keep coming. |
---
| It's VERY important that the next President supports the Postal Service and ensures they have adequate funding.

**We know it 's not the first time we've reached out for your help in saving the USPS, but Trump's attacks on the Postal Service keep coming.**

[**This is too important to back down now, Peter. Will you go on record again this month and stand with Joe Biden on prioritizing a STRONG Postal Service?**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf9b/3432866397/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-support-the-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&subsource=control")
---
| [PETER SUPPORTS USPS >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf9b/3432866397/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-support-the-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&subsource=control")
---
Peter,

The Postal Service connects all of us -- for the price of a stamp, you can send a letter anywhere in America, no matter the distance. It's an incredible thing, and our post offices are still as essential as they were when, in our Constitution, our founders tasked Congress with establishing them.

But the Trump administration continues to threaten the USPS at every turn.

We know we have a winning message at the ballot box, and we're fighting tooth and nail to protect our democracy. That means protecting our post offices, too.

**Peter, will you stand with us and sign on to protect the USPS?**
[PETER SUPPORTS USPS >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf9b/3432866397/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-support-the-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&subsource=control")
---
While we're in the middle of a global pandemic, folks from Maine to California are relying on the USPS to deliver packages, medicine, and letters from loved ones. We need a president who will prioritize the Postal Service, not strip it of its essential functions.

Sign on now, Peter, and show you're with us.
[PETER SUPPORTS USPS >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf9b/3432866397/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/add-your-name-support-the-usps?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.08.09_B4_USPS_X__F1_S1_C2__ac_T2&subsource=control")
---
JoeBiden.com
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf9a/3432866397/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf99/3432866397/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf98/3432866397/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf97/3432866397/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")

[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931bb12/1cd0ac28/17f1f4974/357edf96/3432866397/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

clean_body: We know it's not the first time we've reached out for your help in saving the USPS, but Trump's attacks on the Postal Service keep coming. | | It's VERY important that the next President supports the Postal Service and ensures they have adequate funding. We know it 's not the first time we've reached out for your help in saving the USPS, but Trump's attacks on the Postal Service keep coming. "" | "" Peter, The Postal Service connects all of us -- for the price of a stamp, you can send a letter anywhere in America, no matter the distance. It's an incredible thing, and our post offices are still as essential as they were when, in our Constitution, our founders tasked Congress with establishing them. But the Trump administration continues to threaten the USPS at every turn. We know we have a winning message at the ballot box, and we're fighting tooth and nail to protect our democracy. That means protecting our post offices, too. Peter, will you stand with us and sign on to protect the USPS? "" While we're in the middle of a global pandemic, folks from Maine to California are relying on the USPS to deliver packages, medicine, and letters from loved ones. We need a president who will prioritize the Postal Service, not strip it of its essential functions. Sign on now, Peter, and show you're with us. "" JoeBiden.com | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Official Jon Ossoff HQ
subject: Pay to Play
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Why Perdue wants to gut protections for pre-existing conditions |
---
Friend -- Have you ever wondered why politicians like David Perdue try so hard to gut protections for pre-existing conditions?

**It's because health insurance companies have bought their allegiance.**

**Perdue has taken nearly _$300,000_ from health industry PACs!** _Then he votes to let drug companies rip us off, resists efforts to import cheaper drugs from Canada, and opposes Medicaid expansion._ [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2750/5b2c1286/3eb4e75c/25f1e6db/340166986/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_09_crpt3") **This is straight-up pay-to-play politics. It's why Perdue votes with Big Pharma and polluters, and not the public.**

And friend, corruption in Washington is a bipartisan problem.

Members of Congress spend their day talking on the phone raising money from corporate PACs and lobbyists. They tell the politicians on the call exactly what policies to support to get them to write a check.

_Everyone knows the game. Everyone knows this is a quid pro quo._

And members of Congress flaunt this corruption because they know they can get away with it. Just like Sen. Perdue promoting his "Boardroom" donor program.

_But it doesn't have to be this way._

**Jon Ossoff is running for Senate to root out this corruption and reform the system.**

**His campaign takes NO contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. His grassroots donors are empowering the campaign to expose Sen. Perdue's misdeeds and show how he works and how his machine operates.**

Jon leads a team of journalists who expose corruption for news organizations throughout the world -- and he will bring that fight to Capitol Hill.

**[Right now, will you donate to Jon's grassroots campaign to end David Perdue's blatant pay-to-play corruption and clean up Washington?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2750/5b2c1286/3eb4e75c/25f1e6db/340166986/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_09_crpt3")**

name: MJ Hegar Campaign
subject: Sen. Cornyn's "jokes"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
What kind of senator jokes about this?

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e7b/7f51f7bc/40901eea/4ef785b6/3709842509/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Sen. Cornyn thinks everything is a joke, Peter, from COVID-19 to the president threatening to postpone the November election. We need to elect someone who treats serious issues with the gravity they deserve. **[Pitch in $3 today to help MJ win in less than three months.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e7b/7f51f7bc/40901eea/4ef785b5/3709842509/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200809.3nd__1869__&amount=3")**

Let's take a look at some of Sen. Cornyn's "jokes": | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e7b/7f51f7bc/40901eea/4ef785b4/3709842509/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200809.3nd__1869__&amount=10")
---
Instead of coming up with real solutions, Sen. Cornyn tweeted a photo of his beer. Now more than 150,000 people have died from COVID-19, and Sen. Cornyn's "joke" grows more morbid by the day.

Then, just the other day, the president tweeted about potentially postponing the November election. Sen. Cornyn's take? Instead of standing up for the oath he swore to our Constitution, he said **it was a joke!** (It wasn't.)
[KICK HIM OUT OF OFFICE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e7b/7f51f7bc/40901eea/4ef785b4/3709842509/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200809.3nd__1869__&amount=10")
